expectations.text: 조회 훅이 hooks/apis/{domain}/queries/ 경로 아래에 배치된다
expectations.evidence: Hook file located at hooks/apis/notification/queries/useGetNotifications/index.ts, which matches the hooks/apis/{domain}/queries/ pattern.
File path is hooks/apis/notification/queries/useGetNotifications/index.ts, exactly matching the hooks/apis/{domain}/queries/{hookName}/index.ts pattern.

expectations.text: NotificationList 컴포넌트에 직접적인 useEffect+fetch 패턴이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx imports only useState from React and useGetNotifications from the hook. No useEffect or fetch calls exist in the component. Data fetching is fully delegated to the hook.
NotificationList.tsx line 15: 'if (isLoading)' returns a skeleton loading UI with data-testid='notifications-loading'.
NotificationList.tsx line 25: 'if (isError)' returns an error message paragraph with data-testid='notifications-error' and displays error?.message.
NotificationList.tsx line 65: 'filteredNotifications.length === 0' condition renders '알림이 없습니다' with data-testid='notifications-empty'.

expectations.text: query 훅 이름이 useGet 접두사를 사용한다
expectations.evidence: Hook is named 'useGetNotifications' (index.ts line 45), using the useGet prefix as required.
index.ts line 45: 'const useGetNotifications = (params: UseGetNotificationsParams = {}) => {' — defined as an arrow function assigned to a const.
